TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Darkborn Elves Faction.

Translations.Comment: Dunkelgeboren = darkborn. Dark elves with a sinister edge.
Schrecken = dread. Elite heavy infantry radiating fear.
Hexen = witches. Dark magic users of the dark elves.
Crossbow-wielding dark elves. Deadly ranged troops.
Schatten = shadows. Stealthy infiltrators and assassins.
Heavy artillery. Consistent with other bolt thrower translations.
Knights riding vicious raptors. Fast and deadly cavalry.
Dark elf cavalry on dark steeds.
Dark elf chariot. Swift and cruel.
Standard German term for hydra. Multi-headed monster.
Harpyien = harpies. Flying monsters in service of dark elves.
Corrupted pegasus. Flying mount for heroes.
Noble dark elf leader. Cruel and cunning.
Priesterin = priestess. Female dark magic user and leader.
Master of stealth and murder. Deadly hero unit.
